name: Shrimp with Fettuccine
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Tomatoes, peeled, seeded, chopped -- fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the butter, shrimp, garlic, parsley, onions, mushrooms, tomatoes, scallions, and Creole seasoning to a large saucepan.
2. Stir gently for 30 seconds.
3. Pour in the shrimp stock and cook until the onions are transparent.
4. Stir in the cooked fettuccini and white wine.
5. Simmer until the sauce is almost absorbed and the shrimp turn pink.
6. Turn off the heat, then stir in additional butter until melted and creamy.
7. Serve immediately.
